purpose: Canonical machine-readable rule contract for AI-generated premium event visuals in Bocholt erleben.

city_walk_v2.role: Primary style anchor for locally plausible small-town urban detail images.
strengths: brick, plaster, paving and plant materiality

market_food_v3.role: Primary style anchor for market/food/event-context visuals.
strengths: event-context food imagery instead of pure food styling

creative_workshop_v2.role: Primary style anchor for symbolic editorial workshop and family-safe making visuals.
strengths: safe partial human presence without identity claim

desired_visual_language: calm local small-town atmosphere where relevant
lighting_rules: prefer natural daylight or soft diffused light
allow mild warmth but avoid heavy golden-hour glaze
allow gentle indoor softness for symbolic scenes
avoid extreme cinematic light beams or fantasy haze
composition_rules: landscape image optimized for 4:3 crop safety
clear foreground or midground subject focus
background may be soft but not unrealistically over-blurred
avoid overcrowding and avoid too many micro-details
preserve usable crop for mobile cards
realism_rules: surfaces should feel slightly imperfect and tactile
avoid impossible geometry or suspicious repetition
prefer documentary editorial restraint over visual spectacle
legal_safety_rules: avoid identifiable adults; if present, keep anonymous or partial

quality_gate_policy.pass_rule: All hard-fail gates must pass. At least 3 of 4 soft-review gates must pass. Local-sensitive keys must pass locality_plausibility strongly.

locality_plausibility.description: Image feels plausible for Bocholt / Westmuensterland when locality matters.
locality_plausibility.pass_requirement: Materials, scale, planting, paving and facade logic feel locally plausible without naming a specific place.

no_false_place_claim.description: Image must not imply a specific false Bocholt location.
no_false_place_claim.pass_requirement: Use detail-, edge- or atmosphere-oriented framing instead of a clearly invented central place.

low_ai_artifice.description: Image should not look obviously AI-generated.
low_ai_artifice.pass_requirement: Believable geometry, believable texture, restrained blur, natural object relationships and mild imperfections.

premium_quality.description: Image must feel worthy of a premium discovery PWA.
premium_quality.pass_requirement: Editorial calm, material richness, visual hierarchy and curated atmosphere are clearly present.

crop_safety.description: Image must survive mobile and desktop card crops.
crop_safety.pass_requirement: Main subject remains legible in a landscape card crop without depending on edge-only details.
failure_signals: important subject only at the extreme edge

anchor_consistency.description: Image should align stylistically with one or more approved pilot anchors.
anchor_consistency.pass_requirement: Shares the tonal, material and editorial DNA of the approved anchors.

legal_safety.description: Image must stay within the content restrictions of the system.
legal_safety.pass_requirement: No readable brands, no readable text, no copyrighted art focus, no identifiable children.

local_sensitive_detail.description: Locally plausible detail or atmosphere imagery for visual keys where users may notice fake place claims.
local_sensitive_detail.core_rule: Use locally plausible detail framing instead of clearly invented streets or squares.
prompt_bias: brick, plaster, paving, greenery, bicycle or street furniture

hybrid_contextual.description: Contextual symbolic imagery with some local atmosphere, but primary focus on activity, material or event context.
hybrid_contextual.core_rule: Foreground detail dominates; background context stays soft, unspecific and believable.
avoid_bias: pure still life with no context

symbolic_editorial.description: Symbolic premium editorial images where locality is secondary to safe, believable activity representation.
symbolic_editorial.core_rule: Prioritize materiality, action cues and premium calm over explicit place identity.

local_sensitive_detail: use edge, material and atmosphere framing
hybrid_contextual: foreground detail first, soft contextual background
suggest event or market context without a fixed invented location
symbolic_editorial: avoid sterile or staged catalog feeling

textile_machines_industry.locality_requirement: Lokale oder regional plausible Atmosphäre bevorzugen; keine falsche konkrete Bocholt-Ortsbehauptung erzeugen.
textile_machines_industry.subject_focus: Spinnerei, Weberei, Maschinen, TextilWerk-Führungen und Industriekultur
prompt_avoid: Theater- oder Konzertbild nur wegen Location
textile_machines_industry.people_policy: Personen vermeiden oder nur anonym/angeschnitten zeigen; keine identifizierbaren Gesichter.
review_emphasis: Bild muss den Visual Key textile_machines_industry eindeutig bedienen.
Premium-Editorial-Look ohne KI-Artefakte.
16:9-Card-Komposition mit ruhigem Fokus.
Keine lesbaren Marken, Plakate, Schilder oder urheberrechtlich geschützten Werke im Fokus.
